description: Minute fragment of a legal document, in the scribal hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi, fl. 1100–1138 CE. The text comprises a small portion of the opening two lines from the document. Possibly from the same document as the neighboring shelfmark ENA NS 77.215 (PGPID 13540). There may be other related fragments in nearby shelfmarks. (MCD with information from Amir Ashur)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
